resume_builder.question: Is CareerVivid just a resume builder?
resume_builder.answer: No. The resume builder is one part of the workspace. CareerVivid also includes a job tracker, resume matching, interview prep, application notes, and Chrome extension workflows.

resume_check.question: Can CareerVivid check my resume against a job description?
resume_check.answer: Yes. CareerVivid is designed around job context: save or paste a role, compare your resume with that role, then improve keywords, proof, and interview stories from the same workspace.

direct_applications.question: Can CareerVivid help with direct applications?
direct_applications.answer: Yes. The workflow is built around saving the original job source and application link so users can apply directly and keep context attached to the role.

chrome_extension.question: Does CareerVivid have a Chrome extension?
chrome_extension.answer: Yes. The Chrome extension helps save job postings, keep apply links attached, and connect browser application work back to CareerVivid.

mobile_apps.question: Are iOS and Android apps available?
mobile_apps.answer: The web app and Chrome extension are available now. CareerVivid iOS and Android apps are planned and marked as coming soon.

api_key.question: Do I need my own AI API key?
api_key.answer: No for the hosted app. CareerVivid uses managed Gemini-powered features through the app. Developers who self-host can configure their own Firebase and Gemini setup.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about CareerVivid.
faq.a1: Yes, CareerVivid offers a free tier that allows you to build and download a professional resume. We also offer premium features for advanced AI capabilities and unlimited downloads.
faq.q2: Can I download my resume as a PDF?
faq.a2: Absolutely! You can download your resume as a high-quality PDF document, ensuring it looks perfect on any device and is compatible with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
faq.q3: How does the AI Interview Coach work?
faq.a3: Our AI Interview Coach simulates real interview scenarios. You can practice answering common questions, and the AI provides instant feedback on your delivery, content, and pacing to help you improve.
faq.q4: Can I import my existing resume?
faq.a4: Yes, you can import your existing resume from PDF or Word formats. Our system will automatically parse the content and populate the builder for you.
faq.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a5: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your Account Settings page. Your premium access will continue until the end of your current billing period.
faq.a6: We take data security very seriously. Your personal information and resumes are encrypted and stored securely. We do not share your data with third parties without your consent.
faq.a7: Yes, we offer a wide variety of professional, ATS-friendly resume templates designed by career experts. You can easily switch between templates with a single click.
faq.a8: Yes, you can create and manage multiple versions of your resume tailored for different job applications.
faq.q9: What languages does the platform support?
faq.a9: CareerVivid supports resume creation and interface translation in over 36 languages, helping you apply for jobs globally.
faq.a10: If you have any other questions or need assistance, you can reach out to our support team using the contact form below or email us at support@careervivid.app.

flow.zero_setup_body: Bienvenido a tu branch dashboard exclusivo. Encaja con tu rutina diaria, está completamente activo y no requiere instalación de IT software.
flow.step1_suffix: y envíalo directamente a candidatos durante intake.
flow.step2_body: Usa los filter pills sobre la grilla de candidatos. Haz clic en cualquier candidato para abrir su drawer, revisar sus AI interview timelines y agregar roles populares con un clic.
flow.step3_body: Haz clic en Print Snapshot dentro del drawer del candidato para generar una hoja de envío estandarizada con resume optimizado, mejoras de mock interview y recruiter notes.

privacy.benefit1_body: Los candidatos usan el AI reviewer de CareerVivid para limpiar formato, mejorar claridad e ingresar role tags antes de que el recruiter los revise.
privacy.benefit2_body: CareerVivid administra automáticamente el límite de privacidad, manteniendo datos sensibles seguros hasta que exista consentimiento.
privacy.benefit3_body: En lugar de escribir resúmenes y reformatear en Word, 1-Click Candidate Snapshot empaqueta resume optimizado, recruiter notes y score lift en una presentación lista para cliente.
privacy.phase1_body: Mientras el candidato practica o construye su profile, su resume y respuestas detalladas permanecen seguros y bloqueados. Recruiters solo ven progress scores.
privacy.phase2_body: Solo cuando el candidato activa Share Consent, el recruiter accede al resume optimizado, timelines internos y client snapshot packages.
privacy.revocation_body: Los candidatos pueden revocar el consentimiento en cualquier momento para cumplir políticas estándar de protección de datos.
